query: SELECT s.title, s.playCount, s.tipCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.songId = s.id) as like_count FROM songs s WHERE s.userId = 780095 ORDER BY s.playCount DESC LIMIT 10;
